fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

p = Path("CHANGELOG.md")
marker = "### Changes\n\n"
text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8-sig")
p.write_text(
    text.replace(marker, marker + "- UI: note config panel spacing fix for a normal PR.\n", 1),
    encoding="utf-8",
)
PY

agent_output:
File is clean — the revert succeeded. 

Per the root `AGENTS.md`, `CHANGELOG.md` is **release-owned**: it should not be edited for normal PRs, direct `main` fixes, or `ship it` work. Only an explicit release/changelog generation task may rewrite it.

Instead, put the release-note context in the **PR body or squash message**:

> **`fix`/`feat`/`perf`**: put release-note context in PR body, squash message, or direct commit: behavior, surface, issue/PR refs, credited human author/reporter.

For your UI spacing fix, include a short note in the PR description — the release generator will pick it up from merged PRs when the next release is cut.
